events.text: Diego Godín (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Goal!  Uruguay 1, England 0. Luis Suárez (Uruguay) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Edinson Cavani with a through ball.
Steven Gerrard (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Uruguay 1, England 1. Wayne Rooney (England) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Glen Johnson.
Goal!  Uruguay 2, England 1. Luis Suárez (Uruguay) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal.
